LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GLORIA GEORGE'S MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS IS DENIED. THE CASE DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENT ON CCP 1161.2 (A)(5) FOR EXTENDING THE PERIOD DURING WHICH AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER CASE REMAINS SEALED AND CRC 2.550 AND 2.551 DO NOT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR SEALING RECORDS ON THIS LONG SINCE CONCLUDED CASE.
